sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The segmentation shows there's no white ('W') node in the current frame! The white cross has disappeared. Looking at the image, I can see the white cross is still visible, but it's not being detected as a 'W' color node. This is strange.
Wait, let me look at the image more carefully. The white cross IS visible in the image, to the left of the orange/blue blocks. But the segmentation doesn't show any 'W' nodes. Maybe the white cross is part of a larger gray object and not segmented separately.
Actually, looking at the image again, I see the white cross is visible. Let me check the ascii representation to find it.
But more importantly, the blocks are now at:
- Orange: rows 30-31, cols 19-23
- Blue: rows 32-34, cols 19-23
The white cross was previously at rows 31-33, cols 20-22. The blocks now overlap with where the cross was. But the cross is still visible in the image, to the left of the blocks.
Wait, looking at the image more carefully, the white cross is at the LEFT edge of the gray structure, not overlapping with the blocks. The blocks are at cols 19-23, and the cross appears to be at cols around 15-17.
Let me re-examine. The blocks moved LEFT from cols 34-38 to cols 29-33 to cols 24-28 to cols 19-23. That's 4 LEFT moves. Each LEFT move shifts the blocks by 5 columns.
Hmm, but the white cross is still visible to the left of the blocks. Maybe I need to move LEFT again to get the blocks closer to the cross.
Actually wait - looking at the image, the white cross is visible and it's to the LEFT of the blocks. The blocks are at cols 19-23. If I move LEFT again, the blocks would go to cols 14-18, which might overlap with the cross.
But earlier I thought the blocks couldn't move left from cols 34-38 when they were at rows 40-44. But when they were at rows 25-29, they could move left freely. Now they're at rows 30-34, let me try moving LEFT again.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check if blocks can move LEFT from current position
# Current: orange at rows 30-31, cols 19-23; blue at rows 32-34, cols 19-23
# Try LEFT to see if blocks can move further left
action(['LEFT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
